CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT laser
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Standard laser energy cell for UF covenant weapons.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT focused laser
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Focused laser cell with enhanced armor penetration.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT pulse laser
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Pulse laser cell with EMP effect, effective against mechanoids.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT bolt (AP)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Armor-piercing bolt round with hardened penetrator.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT bolt (incendiary)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Incendiary bolt round that ignites on impact.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT plasma
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Standard plasma cell with explosive and EMP effects.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT plasma (focused)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Focused plasma cell for enhanced penetration.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT plasma (overload)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Overcharged plasma cell with massive EMP burst.
